firstTimeGate.title: Get Protected
firstTimeGate.description: Choose a plan to activate your income protection. RideShield watches for disruptions in your zone and automatically processes claims — zero paperwork.

expiredGate.title: Your coverage expired
expiredGate.description: Your protection is no longer active. Renew to keep your income shielded from disruptions.
expiredGate.renew_success: Coverage renewed! It will activate after the waiting period.

narrative.latest_payout: Latest payout {{amount}} credited automatically after system validation.
narrative.approved_claims: {{count}} approved claims so far with zero worker filing steps.
narrative.waiting: Coverage is live and waiting for the next verified disruption in the worker zone.

payoutState.credited: Credited to wallet and recorded in payout history

hero.greeting: {{name}}, your protection runs in the background.
hero.description: RideShield watches disruption signals in your zone, merges overlapping triggers into one incident, checks policy coverage, and decides payout without asking you to file a manual claim.

claim.pick: Pick a claim incident from the list to view detailed information.

appFrame.alert_success: Dispatcher alerted. They will contact you shortly.

0.title: Parametric coverage
0.description: Workers buy weekly coverage once. They do not file claims when disruption hits because the system detects incidents in the background.

1.title: Incident-first monitoring
1.description: Rain, heat, AQI, traffic, platform outages, and civic disruption signals are merged into one explainable incident instead of noisy duplicate events.

2.title: Visible payout engine
2.description: Eligible claims move through fraud checks, decisioning, and wallet payout simulation with a transparent system story for workers and admins.

hero.title_guest: RideShield turns disruption signals into trustable claim and payout decisions.
hero.description_guest: The product now connects onboarding, worker coverage, admin review, live trigger monitoring, and scenario-driven demos in one coherent operating surface.
hero.title_worker: Welcome back, {{name}}. Your RideShield coverage is already in motion.
hero.description_worker: Open the dashboard to review policy state, grouped incidents, recent payouts, and the logic behind the latest system decisions.
hero.subtitle: Zero-touch. Always on.

system.title: Workers are informed. The system does the filing, scoring, and payout orchestration.
system.description: RideShield is designed to observe disruption signals, translate them into one clear incident, and expose that reasoning across worker, admin, and demo views.

worker.label: Worker surface
worker.desc: Coverage, incidents, payout history, and decision explanations in one calm, readable view.

admin.label: Admin surface
admin.desc: Review queue, disruption pressure, fraud visibility, scheduler health, and city-aware monitoring.

core.title: How the backend becomes a visible product
core.description: The frontend does not mock product logic. It makes the real engine legible so workers trust outcomes and admins understand why those outcomes happened.

errors.phone_invalid: Use a valid worker phone number.

header.title: Register a delivery worker and buy a policy
header.desc: This flow uses the real worker registration and policy purchase APIs. Admin-only simulation actions stay outside the worker signup flow.

errors.locations: Worker geography could not be loaded. Retry to continue onboarding.
errors.zones: Zones could not be loaded for the selected city.
errors.plan_catalog: Detailed premium pricing could not be loaded.
errors.login_failed: Worker sign-in failed. Use the sign-in page to continue.
errors.fix_fields: Fix the highlighted registration fields first.
errors.register_success: Worker registered. Choose a policy next.

basic_protect.bestFor: A low-cost safety net for riders who mainly want outage protection and a predictable weekly premium.

smart_protect.bestFor: The default choice for most active riders who want weather, traffic, and outage protection together.

assured_plan.bestFor: Broader trigger cover with a guaranteed minimum payout floor when conditions turn rough.

pro_max.bestFor: The highest-cap option for full-time riders who want predictive alerts and the fastest payout path.

onboarding.recommendation_reason: Best balance of cost and coverage for your risk level

complete.title: You're now protected
complete.desc: Your income protection is active and monitoring for disruptions.
complete.footer: We'll automatically detect disruptions and handle claims for you.

form.name: Full name
form.consent: Worker consents to location, behavior, and device data being used for claim validation and fraud checks.

compare.title: Pick protection in one glance
compare.desc: Three curated options. Weekly pricing already reflects the rider's live risk score, so you only need to compare cost, cap, and fit.

plans.waiting: Policy options will appear as soon as pricing finishes loading.

more.title: Need a different coverage shape?
more.desc: The short list keeps the decision fast, but the full backend catalog is still available when a rider wants a different cap or payout profile.
more.footer: RideShield is highlighting the quickest three-way choice first. Open the extra option list if this rider needs a different premium-to-coverage tradeoff.

trust.title: Why this feels safer to buy
trust.monitoring_desc: Weather, traffic, AQI, and outage thresholds are tracked automatically.
trust.decision_desc: Straightforward claims can auto-decide; suspicious ones route to manual review.
trust.activation_desc: Coverage stays pending until the waiting period ends or simulation activates it.

next.title: What happens next
next.step_1_desc: Lock in the selected weekly premium and coverage cap.
next.step_2_desc: The policy stays pending until the wait window ends or an admin activates simulation coverage.
next.step_3_desc: The worker dashboard shows the active policy, live incidents, and claim outcomes.

errors.AUTH_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.AUTH_BEARER_REQUIRED: Authorization header must be a Bearer token.
errors.AUTH_WORKER_MISMATCH: You do not have access to this resource.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.WORKER_PHONE_EXISTS: A worker with this phone number is already registered.
errors.POLICY_WORKER_INACTIVE: Worker account is inactive. Cannot purchase a plan.
errors.POLICY_NO_CONSENT: You must give consent before purchasing a plan.
errors.POLICY_ALREADY_EXISTS: You already have an active or pending policy.
errors.POLICY_SIMULATION_ONLY: Force activation is only available in simulation mode.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
